languages.text: "Так вот оно какое, место, где ступала легенда династии. А если точнее, место, где он сгинул. Будьте осторожны, не хотелось бы, чтобы история повторилась".
languages.translation_comment: With trepidation at having entered the camp of the legendary and long-lost von Valantius

languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty tread. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

languages.text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."
languages.original_text: "Так вот оно какое, место, где ступала легенда династии. А если точнее, место, где он сгинул. Будьте осторожны, не хотелось бы, чтобы история повторилась".

traits.locale_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty tread. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."
"So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."
"So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

languages.text: «Así que por aquí pasó la leyenda de la dinastía. Concretamente, es aquí donde murió. Con cuidado, no queremos que se repita la historia».
languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

traits.locale_text: «Así que por aquí pasó la leyenda de la dinastía. Concretamente, es aquí donde murió. Con cuidado, no queremos que se repita la historia».

languages.text: “这就是那个王朝传奇曾踏足的地方了。更确切地说，是他丧命的地方。小心点，我们可不想让历史重演。”
languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

traits.locale_text: “这就是那个王朝传奇曾踏足的地方了。更确切地说，是他丧命的地方。小心点，我们可不想让历史重演。”

languages.text: « Alors, voici donc le lieu qu'a arpenté la légende de la dynastie. Ou plus précisément, l'endroit où il a péri. Prenez garde. Il ne faudrait pas que l'histoire se répète. »
languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

traits.locale_text: « Alors, voici donc le lieu qu'a arpenté la légende de la dynastie. Ou plus précisément, l'endroit où il a péri. Prenez garde. Il ne faudrait pas que l'histoire se répète. »
« Alors, voici donc le lieu qu'a arpenté la légende de la dynastie. Ou plus précisément, l'endroit où il a péri. Prenez garde. Il ne faudrait pas que l'histoire se répète. »

languages.text: "Demek burası, hanedanlık efsanesinin yürüdüğü yer. Daha doğrusu öldüğü yer. Dikkatli olalım, tarihin tekerrür etmesini istemeyiz."
languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

traits.locale_text: "Demek burası, hanedanlık efsanesinin yürüdüğü yer. Daha doğrusu öldüğü yer. Dikkatli olalım, tarihin tekerrür etmesini istemeyiz."

languages.text: 「では、ここがそうなのですね。王朝の伝説的人物が足を踏み入れた場所――より正確には、彼が命を落とした場所。お気をつけください。歴史を繰り返すわけにはまいりませんから」
languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

traits.locale_text: 「では、ここがそうなのですね。王朝の伝説的人物が足を踏み入れた場所――より正確には、彼が命を落とした場所。お気をつけください。歴史を繰り返すわけにはまいりませんから」

languages.text: "Das ist er also, der Ort, den die Legende der Dynastie betreten hat. Oder genauer gesagt, der Ort, an dem sie starb. Seid vorsichtig. Wir wollen nicht, dass sich die Geschichte wiederholt."
languages.original_text: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist er also, der Ort, den die Legende der Dynastie betreten hat. Oder genauer gesagt, der Ort, an dem sie starb. Seid vorsichtig. Wir wollen nicht, dass sich die Geschichte wiederholt."
